prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is S-103 Structural welding within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.1 Steel Erection. The observed field condition is: welding without qualified WPS parameters. The work is being assessed at the tested/inspected lifecycle state with source anchors AWS D1.1. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: T1 S-103 Document interpretation
